metadata.name: Dispute a Minibar Charge on Folio

description: A guest checking out is disputing a charge for a minibar item they claim they did not consume.

nodes.task_description: Retrieve the guest's folio using their name or room number.
Identify the specific minibar charge being disputed.

expected_outcome.value: Agent finds the charge for '$8 - Sparkling Water'.

nodes.task_description: As a gesture of goodwill, remove the disputed charge from the guest's folio.
